source_lists.title: Analog Horror
source_lists.desc: Movies based on or inspired by Analog Horror, which is a sub-genre of horror characterized by the early internet, VHS tapes, and a strange sense of dread given off by children’s tv or Deja vu from that time period. It has a lot in common with found footage, and that’s really where the idea started, with lost media from commercials or websites. It can also intersect with sci-fi in a way, but is usually grounded in reality, slightly altered to include beings from another dimension, or simply demented serial killers. This genre isn’t for everyone, but I personally love it and am excited to see something different and new come along, especially when the early internet comes into play, it… more
